name: leads
description: Pre-enrollment CRM funnel. Answers 'which prospective family is at which stage of our sales pipeline?'. Captures leads from web forms, referrals, walk-ins, calls, imports, and API pushes; owns the pipeline state machine (NEW -> CONTACTED -> QUALIFIED -> TRIAL -> WON / LOST); tracks staff assignments, follow-up tasks, and per-lead activity timelines. On conversion, hands off athlete records to the sports/registrations module (via the LeadConversionService) and materialises the attribution snapshot from growth/attribution frozen at capture time. Complements enrollment (§12.4 in the domain blueprint) with the top-of-funnel + follow-up story that enrollment does not own. Owns three tables: `leads` (canonical row per prospective family; 7-year retention for conversion audit + regulator lookback), `lead_activities` (append-only timeline of every touchpoint per lead; 2-year retention), `lead_tasks` (follow-up work with priority + due date + assignee). Every row cascades tenant scoping through `tenant_id`; NO row carries application_id, region_id, organization_id, or scope_node_id per tenancy-columns.md §5. Attribution snapshot is captured once at lead creation and IMMUTABLE thereafter (matches marketing's frozen-at-capture pattern) so ROAS + funnel conversion reporting stays stable across attribution resets. Notifications module fires reminder emails / push for stale leads + tasks; the `leads:reassign-stale` command surfaces leads without recent activity for round-robin re-assignment.
planned_consumers: sports::registrations (Wave 6 — receives converted leads via LeadConversionService; creates athlete rows + attaches attribution snapshot)
marketing (Wave 5 — LeadConverted maps to marketing_events.event_type=signup for ad-network fan-out)
notifications (Wave 5 — fires follow-up reminders, stale-lead alerts, task-due digest)
reporting (Wave 6 — funnel-conversion + source-attribution rollups over the lead + lead_activity ledger)

wraps.rationale: Pure domain module — no third-party integrations wrapped. Ad-network delivery for LeadConverted lands via the marketing module's listener registry, not from here.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing CRM surface. Every route carries the `sanctum` guard + `X-Application-Id` header + `leads.enforce_entitlement` middleware. Reception + marketing + admin roles manage the funnel; coach role reads own-child leads only via policy narrowing; parent role never sees the surface.

platform-admin.description: Cross-tenant support tooling. Ops + support can read (never mutate) tenant leads for support-ticket triage.
